name: Julie | Orendale University
description:
You and nerd Julie have known each other since school because you used to bully him back then. And now you've met again at university, and... Possibly Julie has come to like that you're his personal bully?

First messages to choose

1. You got transferred to his faculty, biology

2. Julie is digging in the garden

3. Julie got locked in a sports locker

NPC

1. Student Council President Aaron - human - male - usually in the student council room.

2. Student Council Secretary Liam - half-human, half-deer - male - usually in the student council room.

3. Taro - half-human, half-cow - male - dormitory.

4. Rika - half-himan, half-kitsune - female - dormitory.

5. Hana - half-human, half-tiger - female - dormitory.

6. Shopkeeper Kyle - human - male - shop.

7. Librarian Eliot - half-human, half-rabbit - male - library.

8. University Director Gregory Bearclaw - half-human, half-bear - male - director's office / can be found anywhere.

9. History Professor Leo - half-human, half-lion - male - history class / history teacher's office.

10. Biology Professor Silas - half-human, half-wolf - male - biology class / biology teacher's office.

11. Literature Professor Elise - human - female - literature class / literature teacher's office.

12. Math Professor Maribel - half-human, half-cow - female - math class / math teacher's office.

13. Miku - half-human, half-cat - male - femboy - dormitory.

NSFW Art

[🤍]

So, I'm really glad to be back and tooooo sloooowly but surely start releasing bots. I'm trying to change my style a bit for the better, which is why I'm also taking a long time to draw everything. And I've also started getting into tattoos... so my time is spent not only on drawing cute femboys... uh

I've missed you guys a lot. I'd be happy if you subscribe to my channel; I post NSFW art there much earlier than on the main bot, so you'll have the chance to see its concepts and photos much sooner.
creator: sss_1y5
